install: cd /workspace/web && npm install && npx prisma generate
start: sudo service postgresql start 2>/dev/null; cd /workspace/web && npx prisma db push --skip-generate 2>/dev/null; npm run db:seed 2>/dev/null; npm run dev -- -H 0.0.0.0 -p 3000

terminals.name: dev-server
terminals.command: sudo service postgresql start 2>/dev/null; cd /workspace/web && npm run dev -- -H 0.0.0.0 -p 3000
